mappings.description: Data classification maps to information classification and labeling controls
Encryption at rest maps to use of cryptography
Encryption in transit maps to network security and cryptography
Encryption in use maps to use of cryptography
DLP maps directly to data leakage prevention control
Key management is covered under use of cryptography
Backup and recovery maps to information backup and redundancy
Database security maps to access restriction, logging, and monitoring
Data masking maps directly to data masking and test information controls
Secure disposal maps to information deletion and record retention
